title: Myte

moves.title: Toxic Cornucopia
effects: Add 2 Toxic cards to player's hand

move_pattern: If in 'first' slot: starts with Toxic Cornucopia. If in 'second' slot: starts with Suck. Then cycles: Toxic Cornucopia -> Bite -> Suck -> Toxic Cornucopia (repeating)
notes: Starting move depends on slot position: first slot begins with Toxic Cornucopia, second slot begins with Suck. The cycle is always Toxic -> Bite -> Suck -> Toxic.
